name: sole-earner-with-deps-medium-col-2026
description: Sole-earner household with dependent(s), US medium-cost-of-living area, 2026. Comp floors are ~30% higher than single-us-metro to reflect household healthcare, childcare, larger housing, college-savings, and emergency-fund needs. ADJUST per number of dependents (~$15k floor increment per child for medium-col), childcare cost, and healthcare needs.
